clean_component_tip.standalone_locked_gate: expected failure because component manifests require a different resolution while W8 owns the committed activation lock

temporary_component_resolution.purpose: run component tests and clippy with --locked against the manifests under review

lock_verification.w8_combined_gate: W8 regenerates and commits Cargo.lock from all combined final manifests, then runs the final combined --locked gates

results.context: temporarily resolve the component manifests before locked verification

results.command: cargo clippy --locked -p agentdash-agent-core -p agentdash-agent -p agentdash-integration-native-agent --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

results.result: owned scope pass; workspace blocked outside W2/W5

results.command: GIT_INDEX_FILE=<temp> git read-tree <base>; git apply --cached --check --whitespace=error-all <patch>; git apply --cached --whitespace=error-all <patch>; git write-tree

behavior_evidence: two Complete Agent service instances reopen the same durable source and read ordered changes
fork child recovers independently and does not mutate the parent revision
initial context package evidence survives restart
BeforeTool and AfterTool run exactly once with typed allow/deny/rewrite decisions
stale generation and deadline callback errors cross the typed boundary
duplicate execute effects do not retrigger provider/tool/hooks
surface apply/revoke receipts replay and inspect across service restart
same-service apply response loss immediately materializes the committed newer binding generation before replay or execute
same-service revoke response loss immediately restores base callbacks; replay and reopen cannot resurrect the revoked callback
create/fork/apply/revoke commit success with lost response reopens as Applied and replay does not duplicate source/child/surface mutation
same command/effect identity with different initial context、fork child、surface digest or revoke revision conflicts by durable request fingerprint
execute Accepted reservation survives lost response; Dash history mutation followed by a failed Complete terminal commit reconciles after reopen without a duplicate turn
Native legacy driver、journal/context projector、presentation/tool route、native_driver regression and Main oracle fixture are physically absent
atomic_staging_dependencies: W7 must remove Infrastructure worker and Product/API consumers of deleted Native legacy symbols
W8 must implement the PostgreSQL DashCompleteAtomicCommit transaction, compose native_complete_agent_registration and delete zero-consumer Native references from the three session-parity manifests
Cargo.lock remains owned by W8: component verification uses and discards a temporary resolution; final combined manifests produce the only committed activation lock and final --locked gate
